title: Henyey Full (10334 Equivalent)
description: Henyey equivalent of the Stellar Core Full dashboard (Grafana 10334). Covers Health Summary, Ledger, Quorum, SCP, Peers, Buckets, Herder, History, App, Database, Overlay. Panels marked N/A have an explanation; panels marked 'Coming in Stage X' are placeholders for future metrics.

panels.title: Node Count
panels.description: Number of henyey instances reachable by Prometheus. Panel 1 of 10334.

panels.title: Reachable Nodes %
panels.description: Percentage of henyey instances that are up. Panel 2 of 10334.

panels.title: Quorum Fail At
panels.description: Peers that can fail before quorum is lost. Panel 3 of 10334.

panels.title: Quorum Missing Peers
panels.description: Quorum set nodes not responding. Panel 4 of 10334.

panels.title: Transitive Quorum Intersection (N/A)
panels.description: Panel 5 of 10334. N/A: Henyey does not implement transitive quorum analysis.

options.content: **N/A** — Transitive quorum intersection analysis is not implemented in henyey. This is a stellar-core-specific feature for multi-node fleet monitoring.

panels.title: Quorum Delayed Peers
panels.description: Quorum set nodes lagging behind. Panel 6 of 10334.

panels.title: Node Start Time
panels.description: Unix epoch of process start. Panel 7-8 of 10334 (latest/oldest start).

panels.title: Oldest Ledger Age
panels.description: Seconds since last ledger close. Panel 9 of 10334.

panels.title: Ledger Version
panels.description: Current ledger header protocol version. Panel 10 of 10334.

panels.title: Available Protocol Update
panels.description: Configured max protocol vs current ledger version. Panel 11 of 10334.

panels.title: Out of Sync Nodes
panels.description: Nodes not in Tracking state. Panel 12 of 10334.

panels.title: Quorum Changes Last Hour (N/A)
panels.description: Panel 13 of 10334. N/A: transitive quorum not implemented.

options.content: **N/A** — Transitive quorum last-check-ledger tracking is not implemented in henyey.

panels.title: Transitive Critical Nodes (N/A)
panels.description: Panel 14 of 10334. N/A: transitive quorum not implemented.

options.content: **N/A** — Transitive quorum critical node analysis is not implemented in henyey.

panels.title: SLI (Ledger Age at Close)
panels.description: Panels 15-17 of 10334. 99th percentile ledger age at close with SLI thresholds.

panels.title: Stellar Core State
panels.description: Herder state enum (0=Booting, 1=Syncing, 2=Tracking). Panel 18 of 10334.

panels.title: Protocol Version (Max Supported)
panels.description: Configured max protocol version. Panel 19 of 10334.

panels.title: Ledger Age (current)
panels.description: Seconds since last ledger close. Panel 20 of 10334.

panels.title: Ledger Age Close (1m avg)
panels.description: Panel 21 of 10334. Average ledger age at close over 1m window.

panels.title: Ledger Age (history)
panels.description: Seconds since last close. Panel 22 of 10334.

panels.title: % Closed Within ≤5/7/10s
panels.description: Panel 23 of 10334. Percentage of ledgers closed within 5s, 7s, 10s thresholds.

panels.title: Operation Count
panels.description: Operations executed per close. Panel 24 of 10334.

panels.title: Transaction Count
panels.description: Transactions per close. Panel 25 of 10334.

panels.title: Ledger Close Duration
panels.description: Ledger close wall-clock time. Panel 26 of 10334.

panels.title: Operation Apply Duration
panels.description: Panel 27 of 10334. Per-operation apply cycle duration (p50/p99).

panels.title: Transaction Apply Duration
panels.description: Panel 28 of 10334. Per-transaction apply duration (p50/p99).

panels.title: Invariant Failure
panels.description: Panel 29 of 10334. Total invariant check failures (should always be 0).

panels.title: Memory Queued Ledgers
panels.description: Externalized ledger slots buffered and waiting to close.

panels.title: TX Internal Error Rate
panels.description: Rate of transactions resulting in txINTERNAL_ERROR.

panels.title: Catchup Duration (median)
panels.description: Median catchup wall-clock duration over the last hour.

panels.title: Memory Prefetch Hit Rate
panels.description: Bucket/snapshot cache hit ratio. Panel 31 of 10334.

panels.title: Transitive Critical (N/A)
panels.description: Panels 34-36, 38-39 of 10334. N/A: transitive quorum not implemented.

options.content: **N/A** — Transitive quorum analysis (critical nodes, node count, last check ledger) is not implemented in henyey. These panels (34-36, 38-39) track cross-validator quorum topology and are specific to stellar-core fleet monitoring.

panels.title: Quorum Phase
panels.description: Panel 37 of 10334. SCP ballot phase of the tracking slot (0=unknown, 1=prepare, 2=confirm, 3=externalize).

panels.title: Quorum Agree / Disagree
panels.description: Quorum set agreement. Panel 40 of 10334.

panels.title: Quorum Delayed
panels.description: Nodes lagging behind. Panel 41 of 10334.

panels.title: Quorum Missing
panels.description: Nodes not responding. Panel 42 of 10334.

panels.title: Timing Externalized
panels.description: Time from slot creation to externalize. Panel 43 of 10334.

panels.title: Timing Nominated
panels.description: Time from nomination to ballot protocol. Panel 44 of 10334.

panels.title: SCP Timeouts / Envelope Signing
panels.description: Panels 45-49 of 10334. Timeout and envelope signing/verification counters. Fetch metrics deferred.

panels.title: Consensus Combine/Valid/Invalid/Sync Lost
panels.description: Panel 50 of 10334. Value validation and combine_candidates rates.

panels.title: Herder Pending Envelopes
panels.description: SCP envelopes queued. Panel 51 of 10334 (adapted).

panels.title: SCP Memory Cumulative Statements
panels.description: Panel 52 of 10334. Number of cumulative SCP statements stored in memory.

panels.title: Peers (Authenticated + Pending)
panels.description: Connected peer counts. Panel 53 of 10334.

panels.title: Crypto Verify Cache (N/A)
panels.description: Panels 54-55 of 10334. N/A: henyey has no signature verification cache.

options.content: **N/A** — Henyey does not implement a signature verification cache (`crypto_verify_{hit,miss,total}`). SCP envelope verification is done fresh each time via the SCP verify pipeline. See `docs/metrics-mapping.md` §5 for details.

panels.title: Bucket Batch Addtime
panels.description: Time to add entries to bucket list. Panel 56 of 10334.

panels.title: Bucket Merge Utilization
panels.description: Merge time as fraction of wall clock (s of merge work per s elapsed). Panel 57 of 10334.

panels.title: Bucket Memory Shared (N/A)
panels.description: Panel 58 of 10334. N/A: different bucket sharing model.

options.content: **N/A** — Henyey uses a different bucket sharing model (no reference-counted shared bucket memory).

panels.title: Bucket Batch Objects Added
panels.description: New entries per merge. Panel 59 of 10334.

panels.title: Pending TXs by Age
panels.description: Panel 60 of 10334. TX queue age buckets.

panels.title: Publish Status
panels.description: Checkpoint publish success/failure rate. Panel 61 of 10334.

panels.title: Publish Duration (avg)
panels.description: Average publish wall-clock time per checkpoint. Panel 62 of 10334. Custom histogram buckets cover 1s-300s (publishes typically take 30-50s).

panels.title: Apply Ledger Chain
panels.description: Outer download-verify-replay pipeline outcome rate (only counted when replay_count > 0). Panel 63 of 10334.

panels.title: Apply Bucket
panels.description: Bucket-apply pipeline (HAS → restore → init ledger manager) outcome rate. Panel 64 of 10334.

panels.title: Bucket Download
panels.description: Per-bucket-file download outcome rate (terminal, after archive rotation). Panel 65 of 10334.

panels.title: Bucket Verify
panels.description: Per-bucket hash verification outcome rate. Panel 66 of 10334.

panels.title: Checkpoint Ledger Data Download
panels.description: Per-checkpoint headers+txs+results download outcome rate. Panel 67 of 10334.

panels.title: Verify Ledger Chain
panels.description: Per-attempt header chain + tx + result hash verification outcome rate. Panel 68 of 10334.

panels.title: HAS Acquisition
panels.description: History Archive State (HAS) acquisition outcome rate. Counts download + structure/checkpoint verify (and passphrase verify in direct catchup). Panel 69 of 10334.

panels.title: Publish Duration Heatmap
panels.description: Distribution of checkpoint publish wall-clock time. Panel 70 of 10334. Custom buckets: 1s, 5s, 10s, 20s, 30s, 45s, 60s, 90s, 120s, 300s. Empty when no checkpoints have been published in the selected window.

panels.title: Bucket Download Success Ratio by Archive
Ledger Download Success Ratio by Archive
HAS Acquisition Success Ratio by Archive
App State
panels.description: Application state (same as herder state). Panel 73 of 10334.

panels.title: Thread Delays (N/A)
panels.description: Panels 74-76 of 10334. N/A: henyey uses tokio async runtime.

options.content: **N/A** — Stellar-core's `app_post_on_{main,background}_thread_delay_seconds` metrics measure queue-backed thread dispatch latency. Henyey uses the tokio async runtime with cooperative task scheduling — there is no main/background thread queue to measure. See `docs/metrics-mapping.md` §5.

panels.title: Per-Statement DB Timings (N/A)
panels.description: 73 panels in 10334. N/A: henyey uses rusqlite without per-statement instrumentation.

options.content: **N/A** — Stellar-core exposes 73 `stellar_core_database_{operation}_seconds` metrics via SOCI per-statement instrumentation (e.g., `select_account`, `insert_ledgerheader`, `commit`). Henyey uses rusqlite directly without this instrumentation layer. A small set of representative DB metrics (`stellar_db_query_seconds{operation=...}`) may be added as a follow-up if operator demand materializes.

panels.title: Byte Read/Write Rate
panels.description: Wire-level bytes per second read from / written to peers (XDR-encoded AuthenticatedMessage size). Panels 77-78 of 10334.

panels.title: Message Read Rate
panels.description: Overlay messages read per second. Panel 81 of 10334.

panels.title: Message Write Rate
panels.description: Overlay messages written per second. Panel 82 of 10334.

panels.title: Message Broadcast Rate
panels.description: Messages broadcast to all peers. Panel 83 of 10334.

panels.title: Read Error Rate
panels.description: Overlay read errors per second. Panel 84 of 10334.

panels.title: Write Error Rate
panels.description: Overlay write errors per second. Panel 85 of 10334.

panels.title: Pending Connections
panels.description: Pending inbound + outbound. Panel 86 of 10334.

panels.title: Authenticated Connections
panels.description: Authenticated inbound + outbound. Panel 87 of 10334.

panels.title: Flood Broadcast Rate (per-recipient/s)
panels.description: Per-recipient flood deliveries. Henyey-specific — stellar-core mMessagesBroadcast is per-event. Issue #2244.

panels.title: Flood Recv Rate (unique vs duplicate/s)
panels.description: Inbound flood message classification: unique (first-seen) vs duplicate. Issue #2244.

panels.title: Fetch Recv Rate (unique vs duplicate/s)
panels.description: Fetch response classification: solicited (tracked by ItemFetcher) vs unsolicited/duplicate. Issue #2244.

panels.title: Item Fetcher Next-Peer Rate (/s)
panels.description: Tracker::try_next_peer AskPeer selections per second. Issue #2244.

panels.title: FloodGate Known Entries
panels.description: Current size of the FloodGate seen-message map. Issue #2244.

panels.title: Send Rate by Message Type
panels.description: Per-message-type send rates (Stage F.3). Panels 97-99 of 10334.

panels.title: Async I/O Rate (Reads/Writes per second)
panels.description: Successful per-frame send/recv I/O operations. Mirrors stellar-core mAsyncRead/mAsyncWrite. Panels 79-80 of 10334.

panels.title: Inbound Connection Lifecycle Rate
panels.description: Inbound connection events per second: TCP accepts, full establishments, drops, and rejections. Panels 97-98 of 10334.

panels.title: Outbound Connection Lifecycle Rate
panels.description: Outbound connection events per second: dial attempts, full establishments, drops, and rejections. Panels 97-98 of 10334.

panels.title: Connection Lifecycle Totals (cumulative)
panels.description: Cumulative attempt/establish/drop/reject counts since process start. Useful for spotting churn or runaway-rejection patterns.

panels.title: Timeout Idle
panels.description: Peers dropped due to idle timeout. Panel 95 of 10334.

panels.title: Timeout Straggler
panels.description: Peers dropped due to straggler timeout. Panel 96 of 10334.

panels.title: Per-Message Wire Timing (N/A — Deferred)
panels.description: 24 panels in 10334. Per-message-type overlay operation duration.

options.content: **N/A (Deferred)** — Stellar-core exposes 24 `stellar_core_overlay_{message_type}_seconds` metrics for per-message wire timing. Henyey does not currently expose per-message-type wire timings. These could be added as `stellar_overlay_message_duration_seconds{type=...}` histogram if operator demand materializes, but are considered lower-value than the counters in Stage F.
